Custom Arrangement

DM @besitosflowerbar

"Every arrangement is designed the way I'd gift it to someone I love."

— Cinthia Alvarado, Founder & Floral Designer

Hi, I'm Cinthia.

I'm a mom and wife, a floral artist, and the heart behind Besitos Flower Bar. The name Besitos comes from the little kisses I share daily with my son — a word full of warmth, love, and the joy that inspires everything I create.

Flowers have always been my passion. Every box I design is crafted with the same care and intention as if I were gifting it to someone I love. From the color palette to the finishing ribbon, I put my whole heart into each arrangement.

At Besitos, you're not just receiving flowers — you're receiving something personal, made with love, and designed to brighten someone's world.

— Cinthia
